description: Organized crime group and street gang from Curaçao, originating in the impoverished neighborhood of Koraal Specht, Willemstad. Involved in high-intensity drug trafficking into the Netherlands and contract killings. Connected to the murder of politician Helmin Wiels. Operates cells in Dutch cities like Rotterdam, The Hague, and Amsterdam.

country_links.evidence_quote: cocaine they obtain from Colombian as well as Jamaican businesspartners
country_links.context: The No Limit Soldiers obtain cocaine from Colombian business partners.
